creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

After the upgrade to firefox-7.0.1,1 and firefox-i18n-7.0.1

Quick Locale switcher extension does not appear in the menu of firefox-7.0.1, 1 this which is not very practical to change the localization language.

The compilation of the packages is executed in the following order:

firefox-7.0.1,1 then firefox-i18n-7.0.1

It would be very sympathetic, than Quick Locale switcher appear of anew to select the option from menu. :-))

Best regards,

Eric Douzet

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
